aeo_readiness.summary: While the website has strong local relevance and a solid foundation, it lacks conversational content and structured data that AI assistants prioritize for citations.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common customer questions and answers.
Add a 'HowTo' schema for common electrical services to demonstrate expertise.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and operational status, but the phone number is missing.
critical_issues: Phone number not listed in GBP.
Regular posts and Q&A engagement are not evident.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema can be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI assistant citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'emergency electrician Chicago' or 'best electrician for home projects'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ schema to address common customer queries.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating in-depth content on complex electrical topics and showcasing certifications to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to the algorithms that power modern search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content and structured data, 40% of potential leads from AI assistants are lost.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with FAQ and HowTo schema consistently appear in AI search results for key queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates strategic schema implementation, conversational content, and authority-building tactics to position your business as the top choice for AI-driven search queries.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: As AI adoption grows, competitors who optimize for AI search will capture an increasing share of your market.

email_subject_line: Are You Ready for the AI Revolution in Local Search?
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI search and Answer Engine Optimization.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business AI-ready and capture more leads.
